name_en: With full packaging)!!️【New】GG Marmont series small denim shoulder bag
name_cn:
With full packaging)!!️【New】GG Marmont series small denim shoulder bag
This piece is from the Gucci Lido series, inspired by the summer vibes and beach clubs of the Italian coast. This small chain shoulder bag from the GG Marmont series features a soft yet structured design, equipped with a large flap buckle decorated with double-G accessories. The chain shoulder strap is ingeniously designed, offering versatile carrying methods that allow for free switching between shoulder and handbag styles.
Model: 443497.
Size: 26(W)x 15(H)x 7cm(D)
Color: Brown/Light Blue Canvas.
